proposals.spec_text: Adding a new public function to the library requires changes to at most 2 files (implementation + signature file) and no changes to existing consumers.
proposals.actual: Adding toTuple required 4 file changes: Vec3Builders.fsi, Vec3Builders.fs (module-level), plus Prelude.fsi, Prelude.fs (re-export). Module-level access works with 2 files; Prelude re-export is optional.
proposals.proposed_resolution: Update SC-004 to: 'Adding a new public function to the library requires changes to at most 2 files per module (implementation + signature file) and no changes to existing consumers. Optionally, 2 additional files (Prelude.fsi + Prelude.fs) may be updated to re-export the function for script convenience.'
proposals.rationale: Code is correct and well-designed. Prelude re-export is intentional convenience. Spec should reflect 2-tier pattern.

proposals.actual: Library has 13 functions (12 original + toTuple extensibility proof)
proposals.proposed_resolution: No spec change needed. FR-001 defines a minimum set, not a maximum. toTuple validates US4 extensibility.
proposals.rationale: Spec defines a floor, not a ceiling. Assumptions section explicitly allows additional functions over time.
